SEARCH
Package model.serviceObjects

Class ServicePointTree

java.lang.Object
model.serviceObjects.ServicePointTree
public class ServicePointTree extends Object
Tree structure that models the service-point routing hierarchy used by the simulation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ServicePointTree(ServicePoint servicePoint, int _depth, Simulation simulation)
    Creates a service-point tree node and recursively builds the expected child structure for the supplied depth.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    equals(int id)
    Checks whether this node's service point has the requested identifier.
    ServicePointTree
    find(int target)
    Searches this subtree for a service point identifier.
    int
    getActiveServices()
    Counts busy service points across this subtree.
    List<ServicePoint>
    getAllServicePoints()
    Gets every unique service point in this subtree, including shared tier-four services only once.
    double
    getAverageServingTime()
    Calculates average serving time for completed customers across the subtree.
    ServicePoint
    getChild(int index)
    Gets a child node's service point by index.
    int
    getCustomersInSystem()
    Counts customers currently being served in this subtree.
    ServicePoint
    getSelf()
    Gets the service point represented by this node.
    String
    getToString()
    Builds a formatted description of this tree node.
    boolean
    hasChildren()
    Checks whether this node has child routes.
    void
    printTree(int _depth)
    Prints this subtree to standard output using hyphens for indentation.
    int
    serviceTotalCount()
    Counts all service points represented by this subtree, including parallels.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • ServicePointTree

      public ServicePointTree(ServicePoint servicePoint, int _depth, Simulation simulation)
      Creates a service-point tree node and recursively builds the expected child structure for the supplied depth.
      Parameters:
      servicePoint - service point represented by this node
      _depth - tier depth of this node in the routing tree
      simulation - owning simulation used when constructing child service points

  • Method Details

    • equals

      public boolean equals(int id)
      Checks whether this node's service point has the requested identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - service-point identifier to compare
      Returns:
      true when the identifiers match

    • find

      public ServicePointTree find(int target)
      Searches this subtree for a service point identifier.
      Parameters:
      target - service-point identifier to find
      Returns:
      matching tree node, or null if no node matches

    • getSelf

      public ServicePoint getSelf()
      Gets the service point represented by this node.
      Returns:
      current node's service point

    • getChild

      public ServicePoint getChild(int index)
      Gets a child node's service point by index.
      Parameters:
      index - zero-based child index
      Returns:
      child service point, or null when the index is invalid

    • hasChildren

      public boolean hasChildren()
      Checks whether this node has child routes.
      Returns:
      true when this node has at least one child

    • serviceTotalCount

      public int serviceTotalCount()
      Counts all service points represented by this subtree, including parallels.
      Returns:
      total service-point count in this subtree

    • printTree

      public void printTree(int _depth)
      Prints this subtree to standard output using hyphens for indentation.
      Parameters:
      _depth - indentation depth to print before child branches

    • getToString

      public String getToString()
      Builds a formatted description of this tree node.
      Returns:
      multiline string describing depth, child count, and service point

    • getActiveServices

      public int getActiveServices()
      Counts busy service points across this subtree.
      Returns:
      number of active services, including parallel points

    • getCustomersInSystem

      public int getCustomersInSystem()
      Counts customers currently being served in this subtree.
      Returns:
      number of busy service points across this subtree and parallels

    • getAllServicePoints

      public List<ServicePoint> getAllServicePoints()
      Gets every unique service point in this subtree, including shared tier-four services only once.
      Returns:
      list of unique service points

    • getAverageServingTime

      public double getAverageServingTime()
      Calculates average serving time for completed customers across the subtree.
      Returns:
      average serving time, or 0 when no customers are complete
